TESTIMONIALS.name: Rajnish Kumar
TESTIMONIALS.content: Building custom convolutional networks and deploying real-time AI agents on the cloud was mind-blowing. The mentor framework at Invigo Infotech is outstanding!

TESTIMONIALS.name: Neha Kumari
TESTIMONIALS.content: We integrated sensory ESP8266 matrices with remote server dashboards using MQTT. The hands-on curriculum gave me confidence to build real hardware systems.

TESTIMONIALS.name: Avinash Singh
TESTIMONIALS.content: The corporate capstone simulated real-world data-driven business decisions. This gave me direct operations portfolio experience that helped me secure my dream banking offer.

TESTIMONIALS.name: Anjali Sharma
TESTIMONIALS.content: As a Diploma student, finding rigorous practical internships is hard. Invigo provided a step-by-step roadmap from standard HTML/CSS up to deployed production database engines.

FAQS.question: How do college credentials tie into the selection matrix?
FAQS.answer: Invigo Infotech aligns every applicant with their respective tier structure. B.Tech, Diploma, BCA, B.Sc, MBA, BA, and B.Com students are sorted automatically into domain clusters that optimize practical learning. We coordinate with colleges for direct academic credits upon verification.

FAQS.question: Are these internships virtual (remote) or hybrid?
FAQS.answer: All initial technical simulations (Phase I) and advanced structural builds (Phase II) occur within our online metaverse console. Phase III (Capstone Launch) includes live team sessions, and can be compiled as fully remote or hybrid depending on node coordinates.

FAQS.question: How do we verify our achievements and certifications?
FAQS.answer: Every graduate candidate is issued a cryptographic, verifiable certificate anchored to the Invigo Blockchain. This hash can be verified by recruiters anywhere, providing absolute proof of completion, score records, and project assets.

FAQS.question: What happens immediately after we complete the enrollment wizard?
FAQS.answer: An automated offer matrix evaluates your academic inputs. In 5-10 seconds, a futuristic digital offer with a unique candidate ID (e.g. 2026IN123456) is synthesized. You can download this admission letter and access your student dashboard immediately.

FAQS.question: Can I switch my domain halfway through the internship?
FAQS.answer: Because each program uses highly specific, structured physical/logical nodes and mentor hours, domain allocation is locked once Phase I is initialized. We advise reviewing all domains before final enrollment.

FAQS.question: What is the MCQ test requirement for certification?
FAQS.answer: To receive your internship completion certificate, you must pass a 10-question MCQ assessment with a minimum score of 60%. The test evaluates your understanding of core concepts covered during the internship. You can retake the test if needed.
